name: gyrB_consensus_Proteobacteria
description: Conserved single-copy gene gyrB consensus for Proteobacteria. DNA gyrase B (~2400 bp); used as protein-coding alternative to 16S for species-level resolution. Used in PhyEco / CheckM-style genome-completeness panels and as 16S-orthogonal phylogenetic marker. Allow moderate-to-high mismatch within the group.
